title: dendropanax weberbaueri
intro: Dendropanax weberbaueri, also known as the Khati Chakra or Weberbauer's fern-elm, is a plant species belonging to the family Araliaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dendropanax weberbaueri include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Dendropanax weberbaueri are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal benefits.
